query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `website_monitors` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `userId` int NOT NULL,
  `tenantId` int NOT NULL,
  `companyId` int,
  `companyName` varchar(256) NOT NULL,
  `websiteUrl` varchar(1024) NOT NULL,
  `isActive` tinyint NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  `checkFrequency` varchar(32) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'daily',
  `autoEmailEnabled` tinyint NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `autoEmailToContactId` int,
  `autoEmailFromName` varchar(256),
  `autoEmailFromAddress` varchar(320),
  `signalFilters` json,
  `lastCrawledAt` bigint,
  `totalSignalsFound` int DEFAULT 0,
  `createdAt` bigint NOT NULL,
  `updatedAt` bigint NOT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `website_crawl_results` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `monitorId` int NOT NULL,
  `userId` int NOT NULL,
  `tenantId` int NOT NULL,
  `crawledAt` bigint NOT NULL,
  `pageUrl` varchar(1024) NOT NULL,
  `crawlStatus` varchar(32) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'success',
  `errorMessage` text,
  `signalsDetected` int DEFAULT 0,
  `rawContentHash` varchar(64),
  `detectedSignals` json,
  `createdAt` bigint NOT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
);

  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,

  `signalFilters` json,
  `lastCrawledAt` bigint,
  `totalSignalsFound` int DEFAULT 0,
  `createdAt` bigint NOT NULL,
  `updatedAt` bigint NOT NULL,

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `website_crawl_results` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
